title: Shared soul
description: This project will link all the health, hunger and saturation of the players on the server
body:
This plugin will link the **health**, **hunger** and **saturation**

NOTE: Absorption has not been accounted for or tested and may break the plugin.

This plugin does involve a timer which can be disabled. This is because it is recommended to use this plugin in a hardcore multiplayer speedrun.
On the first load of the plugin you will have to use command "/soulrule" to enable and disable features of this plugin.
